title: ophrys × turris-veneris
intro: Ophrys × turris-veneris, also known as the Towering Bee Orchid, is a hybrid orchid plant that is a cross between the Ophrys sphegodes and Ophrys tenthredifolia species. The plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ophrys × turris-veneris include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory tract infections. Traditionally, the plant has been prepared as a tincture or tea for its medicinal use, and it has also been used in perfumery and as an ornamental plant.
